notes: Permanent market-state / regime benchmarks used to assess broad U.S. market conditions.
Each retained market proxy should have one chosen primary stored bar granularity rather than multiple redundant default granularities.
Official macro series remain at original source frequency and are not converted into a separate bar-granularity contract here.
Redundant broad-market ETF duplicates and redundant gold duplicate ETFs are intentionally excluded when a more liquid or already-retained proxy exists.
Independent crypto proxy ETFs and relatively independent industry/thematic ETFs are included when they add distinct regime information beyond the existing core broad-market/sector set.
